archimate:DataObject.name: Multimedia Object Metadata
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: Multimedia Object Metadata refers to structured information that describes and provides context to multimedia assets such as images, videos, audio files, and other multimedia content. It includes attributes such as title, creator, date, format, resolution, duration, keywords, and other descriptive information that helps identify, organize, and retrieve multimedia assets. Multimedia Object Metadata plays a crucial role in enabling efficient search, discovery, and management of multimedia content in various applications and systems.
Source: W3C
Source reference: https://www.w3.org/standards/
LOST view: SV-Business Agnostic Metadata
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/MultimediaObjectMetadataDataObject
ABB name: egovera:MultimediaObjectMetadataDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/MultimediaObjectMetadataDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataSetDataObject

properties.value: Multimedia Object Metadata refers to structured information that describes and provides context to multimedia assets such as images, videos, audio files, and other multimedia content. It includes attributes such as title, creator, date, format, resolution, duration, keywords, and other descriptive information that helps identify, organize, and retrieve multimedia assets. Multimedia Object Metadata plays a crucial role in enabling efficient search, discovery, and management of multimedia content in various applications and systems.
